native will suffer from ear diseases, his enemies will win
and the native becomes miserable and unhappy. There will
be enmity with brothers and other near relatives or death to
one of the brothers. If, however, the 3rd lord is in the 8th
with the 8th lord, and also has the contact of the 6th lord
(either by aspect or association), the native will have
financial gains. The same results can also be anticipated if
the 3rd lord is in the 6th, 8th or 12th from the 8th lord in the
Navamsa.
The native's brother becomes fortunate and prosperous
(in the Dasa of the 3rd lord) if the 3rd lord joins the 9th
house with the 9th lord. Father's property will increase and
the native becomes religious. When the 9th lord is weak,
misunderstandings with father will arise. When the third
lord is weak, the evil results are lesssened.
When the 3rd lord is in the 10th in association with the
10th lord, the person meets with frustration and
disappointments. His daily mode of life will be upset. When
